## Summary
<!-- A concise description of the change and why it's needed. -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] 🚀 New feature
- [ ] ♻️  Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Configuration / tooling change

## Changes Made
<!-- List the files changed and what was done. -->

## Testing
<!-- How did you test these changes? -->
- [ ] Ran `docker compose config` to validate compose file
- [ ] Ran lint checks (`black`, `flake8`, `isort`)
- [ ] Tested on the GCP VM / local Docker environment
- [ ] Verified no secrets are committed (checked with `git log -p`)

## Checklist
- [ ] `.env` is **not** committed (only `.env.example` is tracked)
- [ ] No hardcoded tokens, passwords, or API keys in code
- [ ] README updated if user-facing behaviour changed
- [ ] Branch is up-to-date with `main`
